media.title: 4 Summer League thoughts on Pistons: Ebuka Okorie has vast toolkit
media.description: This year's first-round pick, Ebuka Okorie, is among the Detroit Pistons who could be factors on this season's roster after strong Summer League runs.

items.title: Chaz Lanier leads all scorers in Pistons-Knicks game
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: Chaz Lanier leads all scorers in Pistons-Knicks game Yahoo Sports

items.title: FINAL: Knicks 86, Pistons 75. They fall to 1-2 overall. Another strong performance from Chaz Lanier (24 points, 8-12 from 3). Ebuka Okorie finished with 14 points, 6 rebounds and 4 assists but shot 5-18 overall. He's been adjusting to the physicality.

items.title: The Pistons spoke highly of Chaz Lanier’s readiness last season. The issue wasn’t talent, but opportunity.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt:
The Pistons spoke highly of Chaz Lanier’s readiness last season. The issue wasn’t talent, but opportunity. 

As they prioritize shooting, his microwave ability could be an in-house solution. 
www.freep.com/story/sports...

media.title: Detroit Pistons' search for shooting gets good omen from Chaz Lanier
media.description: Chaz Lanier, 2025's No. 37 pick, didn't get many minutes for the Detroit Pistons last season. But that wasn't due to lack of ability, but opportunity.
